title: Nanopipette-assisted single cell metabolic glycan labeling.
author: Zhou ZR Wang XY Lv J Chen BB Tang YB Qian RC
content: S-EPMC9072180 PMC9072180 Nanopipette-assisted single cell metabolic glycan labeling. Here, we report a single cell glycan labeling strategy by combining nanoscale intracellular glass electrodes with bioorthogonal reaction.
